events.title: 🎬 Make a Hand-Coded SVG Animation!
events.description:
Learn to make an animated SVG file using a plaintext editor and web browser. No fancy tools needed! 
Geany text editor 
Sublime Text 
Happy Birthday example file 
Register
coming soon!

events.title: ✏️ The Writing Room
events.description: Come co-work with other writers in three 40-minute units of silent writing. Writers and projects of any type welcome. 10-minute breaks and accountability check-ins between units. BYO coffee, water, computer chargers, notepads, etc.

events.title: ☀️ Solar Music Synth Workshop
events.description: Join us and build a tiny solar-powered square wave generator on a breadboard. No soldering required! The workshop is free to attend, but you'll need to purchase a kit for $12.50 to complete the project.

events.title: 📓 DIY Digital Notebook Workshop
events.description: In this workshop you'll build a digital notebook, a pocket-sized device for taking notes with a USB keyboard.

events.title: 🪐 Speculative Futures Reading Group: 'Ignore All Previous Instructions' by Ada Hoffman
events.description: Our July book is Ada Hoffman's new Ignore All Previous Instructions, and we'll wrap up our summer with Louise Erderich's Future Home of the Living God in August.

events.title: 🔋 Beginner Soldering: Li-Ion Battery Pack
events.description: Make a rechargeable battery pack for your LoRa node, a microcontroller such as an ESP32 or Pi Pico, or anything that runs on 3–4 Volts.

events.title: 🎶 Hack + Jam: Strudel Pattern Language
events.description: Please join us at the wonderful Iffy Books for this month's edition of our livecoding jam! We will be making music using strudel. NO EXPERIENCE REQUIRED!

events.title: 📍 Offline GPS Unit Workshop
events.description: In this workshop you'll build a device that displays your GPS coordinates and the current time, without connecting to the internet or transmitting anything.

events.title: 📡 Meshtastic 101
events.description: Join us for an introduction to Meshtastic, an application that lets you send private text messages over the air using pocket-sized LoRa radio transceivers.

events.title: 🔊 DJ Basixxx with Mixxx
events.description: If you're curious about DJing but don't have money to drop on equipment, this workshop is for you!

events.title: 🏠 IndieWeb Homebrew Website Club
events.description: Homebrew Website Club is a growing world-wide network of meetups for everyone who wants to take back their web experience from social media silos.
